_comment: Generic bone-segment debug model. A 1×1×4 column of voxels along the model's +Z axis. Entity-local +Z (up) is the axis the renderer maps to three.js +Y; Mixamo's bone bind rotates each bone group so its three.js +Y points along the bone direction. So the column built along +Z lines up with the bone direction in world space when attached with no extra rotation.
